name: Harpooner

abilities.name: Gloryseeker
abilities.text: While resolving actions targeting a unique model, this model receives +1 Skl.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

abilities.name: Weighted Nets
abilities.text: After this model damages a model, it may drain a (t) to give the damaged model a Slow token.

actions.name: Harpoon Gun
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Move the target up to 3" toward this model.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Onslaught
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Lead the Target
triggers.text: When resolving, this model may move the target in any direction.

triggers.name: Massive Net
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals -1 damage, but deals 1 damage to models within (X)2" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain a Staggered token.

actions.name: Reel In
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models. Move the target up to 4" toward this model, + 4" for each raise this attack receives.

triggers.name: Quick Reflexes
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Caught in the Line
triggers.text: Remove a Voyage token from this model. Choose a marker within 2" of the target. Remove the chosen marker, then make a friendly copy of it within 2" of the target.

merge_warnings: Tactical action 'Reel In' has resist='Sp' â€” may be attack action under tactical header (layout exception). Reclassifying as attack_action.
